{{Quote|This thing is basically an insect droid packed with Fly Eye hardware, running a movement subroutine that makes it flutter overhead and bash itself into glow lanterns.|[[Chentu Chek]]|<ref name="BHC" />}}
The '''moon moth espionage droid''' was a type of [[spycam]] developed by [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]].

==Characteristics==
{{Quote|The Moon Moth's programmable wings can go from Socorran sand-brown to Felucian phosphorescent.|[[Chentu Chek]]|<ref name="BHC" />}}
It was very hard to tell apart from a real [[Moon moth/Legends|moon moth]], a common pest on hundreds of [[Planet/Legends|planets]]. Its operating distance was up to 10 000 meters. Since it was easily overlooked, and often dismissed as a small insect, it was useful as an espionage droid. They obeyed only basic commands, including a self-destruct command. They were also capable of depositing "eggs" on targets, which were actually tracking beacons.

==History==
[[Den Dhur]] used this device for spying on conversation between [[Filba]] the Hutt and [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Tarnese Bleyd]], in which he used a headset equipped with a display and a handheld control unit to operate the moon moth. He witnessed the death of [[Filba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] remotely via the droid. The feigned moth was grabbed by Admiral [[Tarnese Bleyd]] as it flew past him. He crushed it within his hand.<ref name="MedStar I" />

[[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] used a moon moth droid to track [[Durga Besadii Tai]] to the [[Hoth asteroid field/Legends|Hoth asteroid field]] during the [[Darksaber (superweapon)|''Darksaber'']] crisis.
